'''Jurga''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] that operated in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. He<ref name="AAEG" /> was known to openly wear a<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|182|Jurga the Hutt}}</ref> [[DX-2 disruptor pistol/Legends|DX-2 disruptor pistol]], built by the criminal [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]],<ref name="AAEG" /> on a sash to symbolize his power in defiance of laws<ref name="TCSWE" /> that were in place on many [[Planet/Legends|planets]], which made the ownership of disruptor weapons to be a capital offense. Jurga was later [[Death/Legends|disintegrated]] with his own weapon by an outraged [[Unidentified employee|employee]].<ref name="AAEG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jurga the Hutt was first mentioned in an entry for Tenloss disruptor weapons in the [[2002]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'', which was written by [[Jeff Grubb]] and [[Owen K.C. Stephens]].<ref name="AAEG" />
